aci.purpose: Control deployable artifacts through scope, QA, approval, receipt, and rollback boundaries.

grimteam.role: Internal coordination layer for boundary review, blocker detection, QA routing, deploy-unit preparation, receipt writing, rollback checklist preparation, and external-action hold enforcement.

safe_claim: ACI deploy-unit and Grimteam coordination documentation were committed to the GitHub review branch.
blocked_claim: No production/cloud/container/ML deployment, official archive, Obsidian sync, publication release, or external delivery was performed.
